description: Call 3 get-shop-item-list versions for Taobao and Tmall Shop Product List through JustOneAPI with shopId and userId.
displayName: Taobao and Tmall Shop Product List

operations.description: Get Taobao and Tmall shop Product List data, including item titles, prices, and images, for seller research and catalog tracking.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: Shop identifier. Also known as Seller ID or User ID (they refer to the same value).
parameters.name: userId

parameters.description:
Sort order for the result set.

Available Values:
- `_sale`: Sales
- `_default`: Default
parameters.name: sort

operations.description: Get Taobao and Tmall shop Product List data, including item titles, prices, and images, for seller research and catalog tracking.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: Shop identifier. Also known as Seller ID or User ID (they refer to the same value).
parameters.name: userId

parameters.description: Unique shop identifier on Taobao/Tmall (shop ID).
parameters.name: shopId

parameters.description:
Sort order for the result set.

Available Values:
- `coefp`: Comprehensive sorting
- `hotsell`: Hot selling / Sales volume
- `oldstarts`: New arrivals / Old starts
- `bid`: Price: Low to High
- `_bid`: Price: High to Low
parameters.name: sort
